purpose: Freeze the explicit kinematic coefficient carried by the branched seed w^(3/2) and its weighted Y_-3 scaling, as a first step toward a theorem-grade certificate for the collar quadratic source term R_quad.

scaling_consequence.interpretation: Any quadratic source term built from one bounded factor and one second-derivative branch factor inherits the rho^(1/2) pointwise profile and therefore contributes at Y_-3 scale r0^(7/2).

what_this_certifies: The explicit 3/4 coefficient in the second derivative of the w^(3/2) branch seed.
The exact weighted Y_-3 exponent r0^(7/2) coming from that branch seed.
what_this_does_not_certify: The full coefficient of the nonlinear maximal-source term R_quad.
The tensorial contraction with A_bulk(alpha_1, alpha_1).
The complete quadratic remainder of m(h_loc,aff + h_loc,branch).
